en.title: Web Development in Munich | Professional Digital Services
en.description: Expert web development in Munich. We build high-performance websites and applications for businesses in Germany's tech hub.
en.h1: Premium Digital Solutions for Munich's Tech & Business Sector
en.p: AVPdev creates cutting-edge Next.js and Astro websites for Munich's innovative companies — from startups to established enterprises.

benefits.title: Fast Launch
benefits.desc: We launch MVP projects in the shortest possible time, saving your budget and time-to-market.

benefits.title: Modern Tech Stack
benefits.desc: We use Next.js, React, and Astro to build websites that are both beautiful and extremely fast.

benefits.title: Backend Expertise
benefits.desc: We architect scalable APIs and complex web applications tailored to German business standards.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Munich?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
